title: Clean up esbuild external lists
description: After removing 12 unused deps in #14, the esbuild --external list in build/build:node/build:stdio/build:http still references them. Update all 4 build scripts to only external the deps that are actually imported. Also remove the duplicate build:node (alias to build).
validation: Read package.json, confirm --external lists match actual imported deps. Confirm build:node removed (or aliased).
